category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a multipurpose automation tool for content; official homepage says FlexGet is a multipurpose automation tool for media: https://flexget.com/
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub repository use the product name FlexGet: https://flexget.com/ and https://github.com/Flexget/Flexget
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links API reference on Read the Docs; official website has CLI documentation: https://github.com/Flexget/Flexget and https://flexget.com/CLI
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub repository is titled `The official FlexGet repository`: https://github.com/Flexget/Flexget
tags_sources: source_facts.description, official homepage, and official GitHub topics identify content/media automation, RSS/torrent workflows, and Python implementation: https://flexget.com/ and https://github.com/Flexget/Flexget
